foundations.subject: surgery
foundations.reason: Excision and reconstruction of skin tumors requires understanding of wound healing phases and closure techniques

foundations.subject: surgery
foundations.reason: Subcutaneous infections (abscess, cellulitis) must be differentiated from neoplastic swellings on clinical examination

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Traumatic skin lesions share examination findings with subcutaneous tumors and may require similar excision techniques

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Skin malignancies (melanoma, SCC) metastasize to regional lymph nodes requiring nodal examination and staging

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Skin changes (peau d'orange, ulceration) overlap with cutaneous tumor presentations; Paget's disease bridges both
